author: ifq-design-skills
description: IFQ Design Skills · built-in HTML templates with ambient IFQ cues already woven into layout rhythm, metadata, local-first typography, and colophon logic. Agents should Read the template before generating, then fork-and-fill with subject matter instead of blank-starting.

modeRoutes.example_prompt: 24 秒硬件发布片头，冷静，像 Teenage Engineering，不要发布会预热。
modeRoutes.fallback_note: Use as keyposter/first-frame scaffold, then read references/animations.md and assets/animations.jsx for timeline implementation.

modeRoutes.example_prompt: 个人站一页，但不要像找工作。
把这份研究整理成一页可打印白皮书。
内部 AI 做一个 command center，像 Bloomberg 终端，不要 BI 套壳。
把这两个产品做成一页对比评测。
做一个 5 屏 onboarding flow demo。
modeRoutes.fallback_note: Use as flow cover/overview scaffold, then read App/iOS rules and inline the appropriate device frame.

modeRoutes.example_prompt: 这周 4 个更新，做成纵向 changelog，要像活页笔记，别像公告栏。
明天沙龙讲 AI agent 20 分钟，给我一份 deck，不要像 SaaS keynote。
把这条发布说明做成一张 X/Twitter 分享卡。
朋友独立咖啡店名片，黑白双面，不要花，要有手工感。
帮这个品牌做一次体检，给 3 个升级方向。
modeRoutes.fallback_note: Use comparison matrix as audit board; expand with references/critique-guide.md for scoring.

modeRoutes.example_prompt: 从零建立一个 AI 工具品牌系统，含落地页和社媒物料。

templates.name: Editorial Hero Landing
templates.notes: IFQ-native hero scaffold with rust ledger, sparkle cue, quiet colophon, and editorial header rhythm.

templates.name: Keynote Title Slide
templates.notes: IFQ keynote title slide with field-note stamp area, spark cluster, and rust divider.

templates.name: Command Center Dashboard
templates.notes: Left nav + KPI strip + 3×3 metric grid + quiet IFQ live-system footer. Uses hand-drawn radar/arrow icons.

templates.name: Vertical Infographic (小红书长图)
templates.notes: Multi-section scroll with timeline, pull-quotes, and IFQ field-note footer treatment.

templates.name: X/Twitter Share Card
templates.notes: IFQ social card with rust ledger, spark cue, and authored bottom line.

templates.name: A vs B Comparison Matrix
templates.notes: IFQ comparison sheet with radar footer and field-research metadata.

templates.name: Changelog Timeline
templates.notes: Release ledger with mono dates, rust timeline spine, and IFQ-authored footer.

templates.name: Business Card (90×54mm + 3mm bleed)
templates.notes: IFQ business card scaffold with spark cue, quiet URL, and authored back colophon.
